category_strategy: Crypto category. Focuses on the Bitcoin RIC and name combined with the specific price threshold and general price action keywords. Uses Reuters and Significant News filters to capture market-moving price alerts.
query: (Bitcoin OR R:BTC=) AND (price OR "77,000" OR "77000" OR "77k") AND Language:LEN AND Source:RTRS AND Topic:SIGNWS
risks: News reports might use '77k' or 'all-time high' instead of the exact numerical threshold
